sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33616" key="e)leuqeropre/peia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλευθερο-πρέπεια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n33616.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">disposition of a freeman</tr_>, condemned by ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:119" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">119</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
